Video.summary: The Graveyard Ghouls return with the final assembly of the legendary General Lee which so happens to also be the official screen-used, record holding, freeway jump-car from the 2005 Dukes of Hazzard film.
Video.title: General Assemble Lee

Video.summary: Mark isolates himself in the machine-shop and begins the assembly of the 440 4BBL for the 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger previously owned by a former cast member.
Video.title: Put Up Your Dukes

Video.summary: It’s a delivery day at Graveyard Carz! We jump back and show you every moment in the restoration of our legendary, screen-used, record holding, General Lee from the 2005 Dukes of Hazzard film. It all builds to a reveal the Duke Boys would be proud of.
Video.title: General Deliver Lee

Video.summary: With all the distractions out of the way, Mark returns to the machine-ship to finish the 440 4BBL for the 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger while master-assembler Dave begins working on the 1970 Lemon-Twist Roadrunner.
Video.title: Inner Workings of a Victim

Video.summary: With Mark out of the shop looking at a potential new location for a Mopar car-dealership, the Graveyard Ghouls begin the drivetrain assembly’s for a 1970 Lime Light Tribute Superbird and our 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger.
Video.title: Dueling Drivetrains

Video.summary: Mark the the Graveyard Ghouls race against the clock to finish up some last-minute tasks on their various Mopar restorations before traveling north to judge Little Creek Casino’s epic car show.
Video.title: Getting Schooled

Video.summary: It’s another reveal day! Mark and Allysa install the graphics on the ’71 Plumb Crazy Challenger and the 1970 Lemon-Twist Roadrunner is finished and readied to be delivered to it’s owner. And Mark proposes - what he thinks is - a “brilliant” idea to the producers of the show.
Video.title: Roadrunner With a Twist

Video.summary: With our 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger nearing completion, works shifts to our 1970 Tribute Superbird while Mark and Cousin Dougie build out a 340 engine and Will assists with metal work with George to help him stay on schedule.
Video.title: Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!

Image.alt: Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!
Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!
Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!

Video.summary: It’s a special day at Graveyard Carz. The 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger that has been part of our show since its inception is finally finished and ready to be shipped to it’s new owner. But before they do that, they take it to the coast to show it off at Chinook Winds Casino Resort Car Show!
Video.title: I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning

Image.alt: I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning
I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning
I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning

Video.summary: Stress is high at the shop and things don’t get any better when Mark finds out that Tony from Tony’s Mopar Parts has secretly flown out to check in on the progress of his 1970 Challenger. Knowing that the restoration hasn’t started, Mark does everything in his power to distract Tony while Cousin Dougie races to disassemble his car.
Video.title: Mopardy

Video.summary: Nick Rutter provides valuable tips and techniques for properly washing your vehicle to avoid instilling swirl marks
Video.title: Exterior Car Care

Video.summary: Nick Rutter teaches how to restore headlights, clean engine, remove water spots and other tips on a used car
Video.title: Restoring A Used Car

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie do what they can to correct the frame geometry of a ‘32 Ford while installing a new front-end assembly.
Video.title: Straighten Up

Video.summary: With a ‘08 EVO in the shop, the guys upgrade the cooling and show us what’s happening with that extra turbo pressure.
Video.title: Evolution

Video.summary: While doing some maintenance on a 200k mile, vehicle the guys tear apart an ABS system and do a complete cleaning and rebuild of the upper and lower intake.
Video.title: ABS Tech

Video.summary: With new welding tools in the shop, the guys go in depth on the benefits of a plasma cutter and offer some great basic TIG welding techniques.
Video.title: It’s the Plasma

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie B embrace the efficiency and power of the new V6 engines with a few upgrades on a V6 Camaro.
Video.title: V6 Camaro Performance

Video.summary: A 1966 Impala is in the shop for a much needed upgrade to the original ignition system
Video.title: Got Spark?

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie bring a high mileage Pathfinder back to life with a complete suspension and brake system swap and a new fuel system.
Video.title: High Mileage Reboot

Video.summary: The guys get invited to take part in some dirt track racing with Kenny Shrader. No better way to learn more about your suspension and ride than to push a car to its limits with the help from Moog Steering and Suspension.
Video.title: Get Dirty with Kenny

Video.summary: British Invasion through the decades.
Video.title: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive

Image.alt: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive

Video.summary: Due diligence on custom builds and their quirky builders.
Video.title: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains

Image.alt: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains

Video.summary: The Concourse d'lemons celebrates the oddball, mundane, & truly awful of the automotive world.
Video.title: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island

Image.alt: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island

Video.summary: Rickey, Bryan and Adam explore all the cars that should never have been built at Concourse d'lemons.
Video.title: Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure

Image.alt: Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure
Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure
Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure

Video.summary: One of a kind cars at Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane.
Video.title: Super Cars at Course d'Elegance

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane at Ameilia Island have everything from classic to extraterrestrial.
Video.title: A New Generation Takes over Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane

Image.alt: A New Generation Takes over Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane
A New Generation Takes over Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane
A New Generation Takes over Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane

Video.summary: A new season kicks off with some big numbers: Featuring the world's fastest C8 Corvette, an overpowered Cortina Mark I, and a Buick Regal with over 1,700 horsepower
Video.title: Voices: Blackberry Smoke

Video.summary: C & O: North America's most diverse car show: Featuring custom Bugs, John Kaase fire breathing '56 Fords, and Chevy Silverados touching 1000HP
Video.title: Voices: Bishop Rob Wright

Video.summary: C & O Jacksonville: Featuring Hurley Haywood's Brumos Porsches, a street legal Indy car, and a dynamic '60 Olds
Video.title: Brumos Collection with Hurley

Video.summary: Jacksonville's C & O's colorful and quirky car culture.
Video.title: Graffiti Artist KBMER

Video.summary: C & O: North America's greatest car show
Video.title: Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell

Image.alt: Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell
Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell
Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane: North America's greatest car show
Video.title: Voices: Killer Mike

Video.summary: Amelia Island's own Caffeine & Octane car show,: Featuring $2,000 Wrek Racing Truck, David Patterson's favorite C&O cars, a plastic Citroen Mehari, and much more.
Video.title: Fuller's Fab 5

Video.summary: The Concours d'Elegance from Amelia Island: Featuring bomb-proof Conquest Knight XV, '69 Camaro Hagerty Fixer-Upper, and car-enthusiast John Oates.
Video.title: Generation Amelia

Video.summary: State-of-the-art engineering and passion projects take center stage on this edition of Caffeine & Octane. The revolutionary Delta Wing Racer turns on hot lap after hot lap at Road Atlanta, and driver Katherine Legge offers insight on how “less is more” when it comes to power to weight ratios; the dark world of a graffiti artist paints a picture of a car called Vengeance while the hosts share the eclectic hybrids of machines that make it to Caffeine and Octane with Vengance’s creator Totem.
Video.title: Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance

Image.alt: Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance
Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance
Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance

Video.summary: C & O Jacksonville: Featuring Hurley Haywood's Brumos Porsches, a street legal Indy car, and a dynamic '60 Olds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Work ramps up on our 1970 Tribute Superbird and just when things couldn’t get more stressful, Mark has taken on a new project - a 1969 GTX owned by non other than Chris Jacobs, host of Overhaulin’. Not only does Chris want the car restored to its former glory, he wants it to be completed in time for SEMA 2017 - only sixty days away!
Video.title: Episode 1
